name: lender-synonym-rbc-royal-bank
rationale: Broker submits intake using 'RBC' shorthand. mortgage_statement doc uses 'Royal Bank of Canada' (formal). Broker correction explicitly switches to 'Royal Bank' (intermediate variant). F1.EL canonical-map must normalize all 3 synonyms via LENDER_SYNONYMS reverse-map to single canonical lender entity. Tests synonym-normalization × broker_correction tier interaction.
notes: Two-event sequence. Distinct from A37 (4-variant cycling); F05 isolates 3-variant resolution with correction-tier authority.
